parameters.name: sensor
parameters.label: Sensor
parameters.description: Select the available OAK Device from the dropdown.

parameters.name: refreshpulse
parameters.label: Refresh Sensor List
parameters.description: Refresh the list of available Sensors.

parameters.name: initialize
parameters.label: Initialize
parameters.description: Initialize is the signal to get the OAK Device into a ready state: The callback is run and on succesfully concluding will run the callback. It indicates that its ready by turning the channel on.

parameters.name: play
parameters.label: Play
parameters.description: The built-in Play parameter can toggle whether or not TouchDesigner processes the new messages it receives from the camera. For example, suppose multiple OAK Select CHOPs or TOPs are connected to the

parameters.name: callbacks
parameters.label: Callbacks DAT
parameters.description: The path to the containing callbacks for this OAK Device .

parameters.name: stream
parameters.label: Stream
parameters.description: Sequence of stream info parameters

parameters.name: stream0name
parameters.label: Name
parameters.description: Specify the name of the stream that can receive textures. The stream needs to be created in the depthai pipeline by creating a XLinkIn node:

parameters.name: stream0frequency
parameters.label: Frequency (Hz)
parameters.description: Specify the frequency at which a texture is being send to the OAK device.

parameters.name: stream0top
parameters.label: TOP
parameters.description: Specify the operator that contains the texture to be send to the stream.

parameters.name: outinit
parameters.label: Initializing
parameters.description: Outputs channel = 1 while the OAK Device is initalizing (i.e. while the callback returns non-zero).

parameters.name: outinitfail
parameters.label: Initialize Fail
parameters.description: Outputs channel = 1 if the OAK Device ran into an error while initializing or creating the pipeline.

parameters.name: outready
parameters.label: Ready
parameters.description: Outputs channel which is 1 after an Initialize and before a Start.

parameters.name: outrunning
parameters.label: Running
parameters.description: Outputs channel which is 1 after a Start and before the Done.

parameters.name: outdone
parameters.label: Done
parameters.description: Outputs channel = 1 when done or complete.

parameters.name: outrunningcount
parameters.label: Running Time Count
parameters.description: Outputs the "wall-clock" time since Start occurred, no matter if the device's parameter was turned off or not. Will stop counting when the state has been reached.

parameters.name: timeslice
parameters.label: Time Slice
parameters.description: Turning this on forces the channels to be " ".  A is the time between the last cook frame and the current cook frame.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.label: Scope
parameters.description: To determine which channels get affected, some CHOPs use a string on the Common page.

parameters.name: srselect
parameters.label: Sample Rate Match
parameters.description: Handle cases where multiple input CHOPs' sample rates are different. When Resampling occurs, the curves are interpolated according to the Interpolation Method Option, or "Linear" if the Interpolate Op

parameters.name: exportmethod
parameters.label: Export Method
parameters.description: This will determine how to connect the channel to the parameter. Refer to the article for more information.

parameters.name: autoexportroot
parameters.label: Export Root
parameters.description: This path points to the root node where all of the paths that exporting by are relative to.

parameters.name: exporttable
parameters.label: Export Table
parameters.description: The used to hold the export information when using the Table Methods (See above).
